title: Accept From Us
summary: The Quranic plea of Ibrahim and Ismail asking Allah to accept righteous work.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّآ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana taqabbal minna. Innaka anta as-Sami al-Alim.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed, You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
